## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Goodcall and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content publishing progress, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Goodcall has published 336 out of 400 planned content pieces, with a backlog of two weeks due to hosting issues](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Area code content strategy aims to boost domain authority and indirectly support other marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Recent performance shows stabilization around 200-250 clicks, with improvements in BPO and Salon categories](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Future strategy to focus on high-performing categories and ICP-relevant content, with potential new clusters around health insurance (PBMs) and agentic voice AI](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Progress

  - [Currently in week 18 of content strategy (1 week strategy, 1 week calibration, 16 weeks of 25 articles each)](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [336 out of 400 planned articles published](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Two-week backlog due to hosting issues; will be resolved once hosting is upgraded](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Area Code Content Strategy

  - [Original strategy aimed to build domain authority and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Not directly targeting ICPs but driving high-volume traffic](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Bob confirms strategy's success: domain authority increased from 20 to 43](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - Prateek to refresh \~50 area code pages, focusing on those with 500+ impressions, \<5 clicks, and position \>20

### Performance Metrics

  - [Clicks: 243 (slight decrease from 252 last week, but stabilizing between 200-250)](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Impressions: 170,000](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Improvements in BPO and Salon categories](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Decrease in appointments and software categories (under investigation)](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [105 out of 330 published articles ranking in top 3, \~50% in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Future Content Strategy

  - [Continue monitoring performance of salon and BPO content](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Consider doubling down on ICP-related content (e.g., salons, truck drivers)](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Explore new clusters based on performance and ICP relevance](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Investigate potential for health insurance (PBMs) and agentic voice AI content](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Update on backlink progress to be provided asynchronously next week](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bob to upgrade hosting to clear content publishing backlog](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Prateek to begin refreshing area code content pages](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Develop a 3-month content roadmap, considering new ICPs and potential clusters](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Investigate and propose strategy for health insurance (PBM) and agentic voice AI content](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Provide backlink strategy update in next async communication](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Focus on developing a cohesive overall strategy that ties tactics to broader objectives](https://fathom.video/share/MZkbBXy1v5xT1CXyztgxyMs1rU5TzYzk?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
